turns.query: Analyze ozone formation patterns at air quality station: East Sewage Treatment Plant during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
turns.actual_response:
东污水处理厂在2025年6月10日至6月12日期间的臭氧数据分析结果如下：
- 平均臭氧浓度（mean_o3）：136.06 μg/m³
- 最高臭氧浓度（max_o3）：235.0 μg/m³
- 臭氧浓度超过160 μg/m³的小时数（o3_exceedance_hours）：16小时

该时段内臭氧污染较为严重，平均浓度偏高且出现明显峰值，共有16小时浓度超标，表明光化学活性较强。建议相关部门重点关注臭氧前体物排放管控，结合气象条件在污染高发时段采取针对性减排措施，并强化监测预警。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先找到"East Sewage Treatment Plant"站点的ID
query_station = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%East Sewage Treatment Plant%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%East%Sewage%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%East%Plant%'
LIMIT 20
""")
stations = pd.read_sql(query_station, engine)
print("匹配的站点:")
print(stations)

# 如果没找到，尝试更广泛的搜索
if stations.empty:
    query_broad = text("""
    SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
    WHERE aqs.name ILIKE '%sewage%' OR aqs.name ILIKE '%treatment plant%' OR aqs.name ILIKE '%east%'
    LIMIT 30
    """)
    stations = pd.read_sql(query_broad, engine)
    print("\n更广泛搜索的站点:")
    print(stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试搜索中文名称或更广泛的模式
query_chinese = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%东%' AND (aqs.name LIKE '%污水%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%处理%')
LIMIT 20
""")
stations = pd.read_sql(query_chinese, engine)
print("中文搜索的站点:")
print(stations)

# 如果还是没有，列出所有站点名称看看
if stations.empty:
    query_all = text("""
    SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
    ORDER BY aqs.name
    LIMIT 50
    """)
    all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
    print("\n所有站点前50个:")
    print(all_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查询"东污水处理厂"站点(id=99)在2025-06-10到2025-06-12期间的O3数据
# 时间范围：2025-06-10 00:00:00 到 2025-06-13 00:00:00（包含6月10日、11日、12日全天）
query = text("""
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(hsaq.o3), 2) as mean_o3,
    ROUND(MAX(hsaq.o3), 2) as max_o3,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN hsaq.o3 > 160 THEN 1 END) as o3_exceedance_hours
FROM hourly_station_air_quality hsaq
WHERE hsaq.station_id = 99
  AND hsaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND hsaq.timestamp < '2025-06-13 00:00:00'
""")

result = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("O3统计结果:")
print(result)

# 存储结果到变量
mean_o3 = float(result['mean_o3'].values[0])
max_o3 = float(result['max_o3'].values[0])
o3_exceedance_hours = int(result['o3_exceedance_hours'].values[0])

print(f"\nmean_o3: {mean_o3}")
print(f"max_o3: {max_o3}")
print(f"o3_exceedance_hours: {o3_exceedance_hours}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查询"东污水处理厂"站点(id=99)在2025-06-10到2025-06-12期间的O3数据
# 时间范围：2025-06-10 00:00:00 到 2025-06-13 00:00:00（包含6月10日、11日、12日全天）
query = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(hsaq.o3) as mean_o3,
    MAX(hsaq.o3) as max_o3,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN hsaq.o3 > 160 THEN 1 END) as o3_exceedance_hours
FROM hourly_station_air_quality hsaq
WHERE hsaq.station_id = 99
  AND hsaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND hsaq.timestamp < '2025-06-13 00:00:00'
""")

result = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("O3统计结果:")
print(result)

# 存储结果到变量
mean_o3 = round(float(result['mean_o3'].values[0]), 2)
max_o3 = round(float(result['max_o3'].values[0]), 2)
o3_exceedance_hours = int(result['o3_exceedance_hours'].values[0])

print(f"\nmean_o3: {mean_o3}")
print(f"max_o3: {max_o3}")
print(f"o3_exceedance_hours: {o3_exceedance_hours}")
